metadata.title: Wellbeing.
metadata.description: App for your daily mental health

home.title: A space for the mind.
home.description: No pressure. No rules. Just a safe place designed for your peace and daily balance. Free for everyone. Forever.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We are creating a comprehensive and free application that brings together all the necessary tools for daily mental health care under one roof.
vision.marketAnalysis: Our analysis shows that the market lacks an application that combines modern UI and AI features with professional localized support and crisis intervention, while offering a personalized approach. Our project represents this intersection.

fullList.title: Personalization & First Steps
fullList.desc: The app adapts to you from the first moment. A short questionnaire maps your current state and goals.

fullList.title: Digital Diary & Emotions
fullList.desc: A safe space for reflection. Mood tracker using the RULER method and interactive guided journaling.

fullList.title: Monitoring Sleep & Activities
fullList.desc: Track sleep quality and find correlations between your daily activities and mood.

fullList.title: Therapeutic Tools
fullList.desc: Visual breathing exercises and specialized modules for managing anxiety, stress, or panic attacks.

fullList.title: Goals & Motivation
fullList.desc: Plan short-term and long-term goals with clear progress tracking.

fullList.title: Analytics & Correlations
fullList.desc: Advanced mood graphs and automatic correlation analysis between lifestyle and mental health.

fullList.title: Crisis Support
fullList.desc: Instant access to an SOS button and an up-to-date directory of professional help and crisis centers.

developer.title: Developer Friendly
developer.description: We believe in open ecosystems. Built on Next.js, fully customizable, and designed with developers in mind.

contact.title: Stay in Touch
contact.description: Want to learn more? Join our newsletter.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! You have been subscribed.
contact.privacyText: I agree to have my email collected for newsletter purposes. We process in accordance with GDPR.

screener.heading: Try a 1-minute wellbeing check
screener.intro: These are brief, internationally validated screeners. Your answers stay in your browser — nothing is stored or sent anywhere. The result is informational, not a diagnosis.
screener.pickPrompt: Which check would you like to try?

who5.name: WHO-5 · Wellbeing
who5.blurb: 5 questions · general wellbeing over the past 2 weeks
items: I have felt cheerful and in good spirits
I have felt calm and relaxed
I have felt active and vigorous
I woke up feeling fresh and rested
My daily life has been filled with things that interest me

phq9.name: PHQ-9 · Depression
phq9.blurb: 9 questions · mood over the past 2 weeks
phq9.timeframe: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by…
items: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless
Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
Feeling tired or having little energy
Poor appetite or overeating
Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down
Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading or watching television
Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed — or being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way

gad7.name: GAD-7 · Anxiety
gad7.blurb: 7 questions · anxiety over the past 2 weeks
gad7.timeframe: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by…
items: Feeling nervous, anxious or on edge
Not being able to stop or control worrying
Worrying too much about different things
Trouble relaxing
Being so restless that it is hard to sit still
Becoming easily annoyed or irritable
Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen

ui.disclaimer: Screening tools are not a diagnosis. If anything here resonates, consider talking to a mental-health professional.
ui.crisisTitle: Please reach out — you are not alone
ui.crisisBody: Your answers suggest it would help to talk to someone now. In the Czech Republic call 116 123 (Linka první psychické pomoci, 24/7) or 112 in an emergency. If you are in immediate danger, contact local emergency services.

privacy.weCollectDesc: We collect your email address when you sign up for our newsletter. This information is collected solely for the purpose of sending newsletter updates about Wellbeing.
privacy.subscriptionProcessing: processing your subscription to our service
privacy.usageHeader: Your email will be used exclusively for:
privacy.rightsHeader: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.retentionDesc: We retain your email address only for as long as you remain subscribed to our newsletter. You can request deletion at any time by unsubscribing.
privacy.processorDesc: We use Resend as our third-party newsletter service provider to manage and send our newsletter communications.
privacy.controllerDesc: The data controller for Wellbeing is Anna Zezulka. For any privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at: info@wellbeing-app.com
privacy.consent: We process your personal data based on your consent, which you provide by checking the consent box when signing up for the newsletter. You can withdraw your consent at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any email.
privacy.correction: requesting a correction of your data
privacy.deletion: requesting the deletion of your data
privacy.withdraw: withdrawing your consent at any time
privacy.questions: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our data processing practices, please contact us.
